research_question: Does MAVS-GC reduce variance under corruption?
claim_text: Pure MAVS-GC mean corrupted accuracy/F1 variance is 0.0172849; the non-Pure-MAVS comparison mean is 0.0148235.
supporting_rows: all rows matching the stated metric, family, level, system, and run-mode filters
evidence_rule: Compare Pure MAVS-GC mean corrupted accuracy/F1 variance against all non-Pure-MAVS systems for levels greater than 0.0.
interpretation_applied: The reproducibility effect does not generalize uniformly across stress conditions.

research_question: Does MAVS-GC maintain stability by increasing rejection?
claim_text: Pure MAVS-GC mean rejection under corruption is 0.0231708; the comparison mean is 0.00717495. Pure MAVS-GC decision stability is 0.97577; the comparison mean is 0.958762.
supporting_rows: all rows matching the stated metric, family, level, system, and run-mode filters
evidence_rule: Check whether Pure MAVS-GC has higher corrupted rejection while preserving decision stability.
interpretation_applied: Stability is achieved through a caution tradeoff.

research_question: Does specialist failure significantly affect reproducibility?
claim_text: Specialist-failure mean prediction stability is 0.9385; all other corruption families average 0.958743.
supporting_rows: all rows matching the stated metric, family, level, system, and run-mode filters
evidence_rule: Compare specialist_failure mean prediction stability against the average of all other corruption families.
interpretation_applied: Specialist failure is a material reproducibility stressor.

research_question: Are governance-induced stability effects stronger under corruption than under clean conditions?
claim_text: Pure MAVS-GC decision-stability delta versus comparison systems is -0.00684573 at level 0.0 and 0.0170086 for levels greater than 0.0.
supporting_rows: all rows matching the stated metric, family, level, system, and run-mode filters
evidence_rule: Compare Pure MAVS-GC decision-stability advantage at clean-anchor level 0.0 against the corrupted-level advantage.
interpretation_applied: MAVS-GC primarily functions as a governance architecture under adverse conditions rather than as a clean-condition reproducibility optimizer.
